title: bus.hearth.approval.responded v1
description: Emitted by hearth-api's reactor route when the Android app fires the Approve/Reject button for a non-permission correlation_id (variant votes, wave gates, council picks, etc.). For permission correlation_ids the flow routes through permission_publisher which handles keystroke injection and emits the permission.responded event instead.

correlation_id.description: Opaque correlation token that links this response to the original approval card on the phone.

note.description: Optional feedback text supplied when rejecting with a note.

responded_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the reactor received the response.
